testcase.name: test_ai_suggest_anthropic
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_backend.py:115: in test_ai_suggest_anthropic assert r.status_code == 200, f"anthropic failed: {r.text[:400]}" E AssertionError: anthropic failed: {"detail":"AI call failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_ai_suggest_openai
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_backend.py:126: in test_ai_suggest_openai assert r.status_code == 200, f"openai failed: {r.text[:400]}" E AssertionError: openai failed: {"detail":"AI call failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
